final:
// // This module selects between two 32-bit inputs based on the src signal. When src is 0, it outputs input2; otherwise, it outputs input1.
module top_module(
    input src,
    input[31:0] input1,
    input[31:0] input2,
    output reg[31:0] outputResult
    );always@(src or input1 or input2)
    begin
        if(src == 0)
        begin
            outputResult <= input1;
        end
        else
        begin
            outputResult <= input2;
        end
    end
endmodule
